controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - credit cards and debit cards: issuance and conduct) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Credit
Cards and Debit Cards: Issuance and Conduct) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - credit cards and debit cards: issuance and conduct) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to commercial banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Commercial Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to commercial banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

controls.control_objective: To ensure be read along with prudential, payment and technology & cyber security related directions applicable to credit, debit and co-branded cards, as issued
controls.control_description:
These Directions cover the general and conduct regulations relating to credit, debit and
co-branded cards which shall be read along with prudential, payment and technology &
cyber security related Directions applicable to credit, debit and co-branded cards, as
issued by the RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be read along with prudential, payment and technology & cyber security related directions applicable to credit, debit and co-branded cards, as issued

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) add-on credit card means a supplementary credit card to the principal or primary credit card, issued to person/s with predefined relationship with the primary cardholder, within the credit limits and liability of the latter
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall bear the
meanings assigned to them below:
(1) Add-on Credit Card means a supplementary credit card to the principal or primary
credit card, issued to person/s with predefined relationship with the primary
cardholder, within the credit limits and liability of the latter, subject to such terms and
conditions as stipulated by the card-issuer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) add-on credit card means a supplementary credit card to the principal or primary credit card, issued to person/s with predefined relationship with the primary cardholder, within the credit limits and liability of the latter

controls.control_objective: To ensure of identification, linked to a savings bank / current account which can be used to withdraw cash, make online payments, do pos terminal / quick respon
controls.control_description:
(14) Debit Card is a physical or virtual payment instrument containing a means of
identification, linked to a Savings Bank / Current Account which can be used to
withdraw cash, make online payments, do PoS terminal / Quick Response (QR) code
transactions, fund transfer, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to of identification, linked to a savings bank / current account which can be used to withdraw cash, make online payments, do pos terminal / quick respon

controls.control_objective: To ensure the customer who has been issued credit card by a card-issuer and on whose name the card account has been opened
controls.control_description:
(20) Principal Cardholder means the customer who has been issued credit card by a
card-issuer and on whose name the card account has been opened.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the customer who has been issued credit card by a card-issuer and on whose name the card account has been opened

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as an unsolicited card
controls.control_description:
Provided that the issuance of a credit card for renewal or replacement shall not be
treated as an unsolicited card.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as an unsolicited card

controls.control_objective: To ensure enhancement in the benefits and features of credit cards issued, for example, an increase in the credit or cash limit of the card
controls.control_description:
(23) Upgradation of Credit Card means enhancement in the benefits and features of
credit cards issued, for example, an increase in the credit or cash limit of the card.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to enhancement in the benefits and features of credit cards issued, for example, an increase in the credit or cash limit of the card

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory mod
controls.control_description:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have been
assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank of India
Act, 1934 or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or as used in commercial
parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory mod

controls.control_objective: To ensure require prior approval of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
Banks desirous of setting up separate
subsidiaries for undertaking credit card business shall require prior approval of the
Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require prior approval of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a well-documented board approved policy for the issuance and conduct of credit cards
controls.control_description:
Each card-issuer shall have a well-documented Board approved policy for the issuance
and conduct of credit cards.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have a well-documented board approved policy for the issuance and conduct of credit cards

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in consonance with various instructions on the subject issued by the reserve bank from time to time, as well as these directions
controls.control_description:
The Board approved policy shall be in consonance with
various instructions on the subject issued by the Reserve Bank from time to time, as well
as these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in consonance with various instructions on the subject issued by the reserve bank from time to time, as well as these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be available on the website of the card-issuer
controls.control_description:
The Board approved policy shall be available on the website of the
card-issuer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be available on the website of the card-issuer

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, cover the following aspects: (1) interest rate ceiling and other charges
controls.control_description:
The policy should, inter alia, cover the following aspects:
(1) Interest rate ceiling and other charges.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia, cover the following aspects: (1) interest rate ceiling and other charges

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a mechanism for review of their credit card operations on half-yearly basis by the audit committee of the board of directors
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall put in place a mechanism for review of their credit card operations on
half-yearly basis by the Audit Committee of the Board of Directors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a mechanism for review of their credit card operations on half-yearly basis by the audit committee of the board of directors

controls.control_objective: To ensure <image> include, inter-alia, customer service, frauds, complaints and grievance redressal, card usage analysis including cards not used for long durat
controls.control_description:
The review shall
<image>
include, inter-alia, customer service, frauds, complaints and grievance redressal, card
usage analysis including cards not used for long durations and the inherent risks therein.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to <image> include, inter-alia, customer service, frauds, complaints and grievance redressal, card usage analysis including cards not used for long durat

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide a one-page key fact statement along with the credit card application containing the important aspects of the card such as rate of interest, qu
controls.control_description:
Customer Acquisition:
(1) Card-issuers shall provide a one-page Key Fact Statement along with the credit card
application containing the important aspects of the card such as rate of interest, quantum
of charges, among others.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide a one-page key fact statement along with the credit card application containing the important aspects of the card such as rate of interest, qu

controls.control_objective: To ensure convey in writing the specific reason/s which led to the rejection of the application
controls.control_description:
In case of rejection of a credit card application, the card-issuer
shall convey in writing the specific reason/s which led to the rejection of the application.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to convey in writing the specific reason/s which led to the rejection of the application

controls.control_objective: To ensure be highlighted and published / sent separately to the customers, at the acceptance stage (welcome kit) and in important subsequent communications
controls.control_description:
(2) The MITC as given in Chapter VII of these Directions, shall be highlighted and published
/ sent separately to the customers, at the acceptance stage (welcome kit) and in
important subsequent communications.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be highlighted and published / sent separately to the customers, at the acceptance stage (welcome kit) and in important subsequent communications

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided to the customer (preferably in english, hindi and the local language) at the time of onboarding and each time, a condition is modified wit
controls.control_description:
The MITC shall be provided to the customer
(preferably in English, Hindi and the local language) at the time of onboarding and each
time, a condition is modified with notice to the customer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided to the customer (preferably in english, hindi and the local language) at the time of onboarding and each time, a condition is modified wit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sent to the registered email address of the cardholder or postal address as per the choice of the customer
controls.control_description:
The MITC and copy of the
agreement signed/digitally signed between the card-issuer and cardholder shall be sent
to the registered email address of the cardholder or postal address as per the choice of
the customer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sent to the registered email address of the cardholder or postal address as per the choice of the customer

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider introducing, at the option of the customers, an insurance cover to take care of the liabilities arising out of lost cards, card frauds, etc
controls.control_description:
(3) Card-issuers may consider introducing, at the option of the customers, an insurance
cover to take care of the liabilities arising out of lost cards, card frauds, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider introducing, at the option of the customers, an insurance cover to take care of the liabilities arising out of lost cards, card frauds, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain explicit consent in writing or in digital mode from the cardholders along with the details of nominee/s
controls.control_description:
In cases
where the card-issuers are offering any insurance cover to their cardholders, in tie-up
with insurance companies, the card-issuers shall obtain explicit consent in writing or in
digital mode from the cardholders along with the details of nominee/s.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain explicit consent in writing or in digital mode from the cardholders along with the details of nominee/s

controls.control_objective: To ensure only reverse the charges forthwith, but also pay a penalty without demur to the recipient amounting to twice the value of the charges reversed
controls.control_description:
In case, an unsolicited
card is issued / existing card upgraded and activated without the explicit consent of the
recipient and the latter is billed for the same, the card-issuer shall not only reverse the
charges forthwith, but also pay a penalty without demur to the recipient amounting to
twice the value of the charges reversed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only reverse the charges forthwith, but also pay a penalty without demur to the recipient amounting to twice the value of the charges reversed

controls.control_objective: To ensure refrain from activating or providing consent for activation of card through otp or any other means
controls.control_description:
<image>
Explanation: In case a customer receives an unsolicited card, he / she should refrain
from activating or providing consent for activation of card through OTP or any other
means.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refrain from activating or providing consent for activation of card through otp or any other means

controls.control_objective: To ensure also intimate the customer that the credit card account has been closed
controls.control_description:
If no consent is received for activating the card, the card-issuer is required to
close the credit card account without any cost to the customer within seven working days
from the date of seeking confirmation from the customer and shall also intimate the
customer that the credit card account has been closed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also intimate the customer that the credit card account has been closed

controls.control_objective: To ensure destroy the card
controls.control_description:
Subsequent to receiving the
intimation from the card-issuer that the card account has been closed, the customer shall
destroy the card.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to destroy the card

controls.control_objective: To ensure be held responsible for the same
controls.control_description:
It is emphasised
that any loss arising out of misuse of such unsolicited cards shall be the responsibility of
the card-issuer only and the person in whose name the card has been issued shall not
be held responsible for the same.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be held responsible for the same

controls.control_objective: To ensure seek one time password (otp) based consent from the cardholder for activating a credit card
controls.control_description:
(6) Card-issuers shall seek One Time Password (OTP) based consent from the cardholder
for activating a credit card, if the same has not been activated by the customer for more
than 30 days from the date of issuance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to seek one time password (otp) based consent from the cardholder for activating a credit card

controls.control_objective: To ensure close the credit card account without any cost to the customer within seven working days from date of seeking confirmation from the customer
controls.control_description:
If no consent is received for activating the card,
card-issuers shall close the credit card account without any cost to the customer within
seven working days from date of seeking confirmation from the customer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to close the credit card account without any cost to the customer within seven working days from date of seeking confirmation from the customer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to payment of all dues by the cardholder
controls.control_description:
In case of a
renewed or replaced card, the closure of an inactivated card shall be subject to payment
of all dues by the cardholder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to payment of all dues by the cardholder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered as activation of credit card
controls.control_description:
Explanation: (i) Customer-initiated process indicating intent to use a credit card such as
PIN generation, modification of transaction control, Interactive Voice Response, recorded
call to the customer care centre and SMS may be considered as activation of Credit Card.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered as activation of credit card

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure prudence while issuing credit cards and independently assess the credit risk while issuing cards to persons, taking into account independent fi
controls.control_description:
Underwriting Standards:
(1) Card-issuers shall ensure prudence while issuing credit cards and independently
assess the credit risk while issuing cards to persons, taking into account independent
financial means of applicants.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure prudence while issuing credit cards and independently assess the credit risk while issuing cards to persons, taking into account independent fi

controls.control_objective: To ensure assess the credit limit for a credit card customer taking into consideration all the limits enjoyed by the cardholder from other entities on the basis
controls.control_description:
(2) As holding several credit cards enhances the total credit available to any consumer,
card-issuers shall assess the credit limit for a credit card customer taking into
consideration all the limits enjoyed by the cardholder from other entities on the basis of
self-declaration / credit information obtained from a Credit Information Company, as
appropriate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to assess the credit limit for a credit card customer taking into consideration all the limits enjoyed by the cardholder from other entities on the basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be uniformly applied as per the board approved policy of the card-issuer
controls.control_description:
This shall be uniformly applied as per the board approved policy of the
card-issuer.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be uniformly applied as per the board approved policy of the card-issuer

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure complete transparency in the conversion of credit card transactions to equated monthly instalments (emis) by clearly indicating the principal
controls.control_description:
<image>
(3) Card-issuers shall ensure complete transparency in the conversion of credit card
transactions to Equated Monthly Instalments (EMIs) by clearly indicating the principal,
interest and upfront discount provided by the merchant/card-issuer (to make it no cost),
prior to the conversion.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure complete transparency in the conversion of credit card transactions to equated monthly instalments (emis) by clearly indicating the principal

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be separately indicated in the credit card bill / statement
controls.control_description:
The same shall also be separately indicated in the credit card
bill / statement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be separately indicated in the credit card bill / statement

controls.control_objective: To ensure be camouflaged as zero-interest / no-cost emi
controls.control_description:
EMI conversion with interest component shall not be camouflaged as
zero-interest / no-cost EMI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be camouflaged as zero-interest / no-cost emi

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that loans offered through credit cards are in compliance with the instructions on loans and advances issued by the reserve bank from time to t
controls.control_description:
(4) Card-issuers shall ensure that loans offered through credit cards are in compliance with
the instructions on loans and advances issued by the Reserve Bank from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that loans offered through credit cards are in compliance with the instructions on loans and advances issued by the reserve bank from time to t

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the credit limit as sanctioned and advised to the cardholder is not breached at any point in time without seeking explicit consent from th
controls.control_description:
(5) Card-issuers shall ensure that the credit limit as sanctioned and advised to the
cardholder is not breached at any point in time without seeking explicit consent from
the cardholder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to ensure that the credit limit as sanctioned and advised to the cardholder is not breached at any point in time without seeking explicit consent from th

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given an option to enable or disable the option of overlimit through transaction control mechanism available on card-issuer's platforms such as int
controls.control_description:
Further, a cardholder shall be given an option to enable or disable the option of overlimit
through transaction control mechanism available on card-issuer's platforms such as
internet, mobile banking, or any other suitable medium.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given an option to enable or disable the option of overlimit through transaction control mechanism available on card-issuer's platforms such as int

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue credit cards / charge cards to individuals for personal use together with add-on cards wherever required
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers may issue credit cards / charge cards to individuals for personal use together
with add-on cards wherever required.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue credit cards / charge cards to individuals for personal use together with add-on cards wherever required

controls.control_objective: To ensure also issue cards linked to overdraft accounts that are in the nature of personal loans without any end-use restrictions subject to the conditions as s
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers may also issue cards linked to overdraft accounts that are in the nature of
personal loans without any end-use restrictions subject to the conditions as stipulated in
the overdraft account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also issue cards linked to overdraft accounts that are in the nature of personal loans without any end-use restrictions subject to the conditions as s

controls.control_objective: To ensure correspond to the terms and conditions applicable to the overdraft facility
controls.control_description:
The terms of usage of this
credit card (interest charged, repayment schedule, penalty, cash withdrawal limit etc.,)
shall correspond to the terms and conditions applicable to the overdraft facility.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to correspond to the terms and conditions applicable to the overdraft facility

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue business credit cards to business entities / individuals for business expenses
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers may issue business credit cards to business entities / individuals for
business expenses.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue business credit cards to business entities / individuals for business expenses

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be issued as charge cards, corporate credit cards or by linking a credit facility such as overdraft / cash credit provided for business purpose a
controls.control_description:
The business credit cards may also be issued as charge cards,
corporate credit cards or by linking a credit facility such as overdraft / cash credit provided
for business purpose as per the terms and conditions stipulated for the facility concerned.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be issued as charge cards, corporate credit cards or by linking a credit facility such as overdraft / cash credit provided for business purpose a

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place effective mechanism to monitor end use of funds
controls.control_description: The card-issuers shall put in place effective mechanism to monitor end use of funds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place effective mechanism to monitor end use of funds

controls.control_objective: To ensure form part of their total assessed credits for compliance to instructions issued by the reserve bank on exposure norms as well as prudential norms on i
controls.control_description:
The liability of the corporate / business entity on account of business cards shall form part
of their total assessed credits for compliance to instructions issued by the Reserve Bank
on Exposure Norms as well as Prudential norms on Income Recognition, Asset
Classification and Provisioning pertaining to Advances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to form part of their total assessed credits for compliance to instructions issued by the reserve bank on exposure norms as well as prudential norms on i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued only to the persons specifically identified by the principal cardholder under both personal and business credit card categories
controls.control_description:
The add-on cards shall be issued only to the persons specifically identified by the principal
cardholder under both personal and business credit card categories.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued only to the persons specifically identified by the principal cardholder under both personal and business credit card categories

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued with the clear understanding that the liability will be that of the principal cardholder
controls.control_description:
Add-on cards shall
be issued with the clear understanding that the liability will be that of the principal
cardholder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued with the clear understanding that the liability will be that of the principal cardholder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly specified
controls.control_description:
Similarly, while issuing corporate credit cards, the responsibilities and
liabilities of the corporate and its employees shall be clearly specified.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly specified

controls.control_objective: To ensure form part of its assessed credits
controls.control_description:
The liability of the
corporate / business entity shall form part of its assessed credits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to form part of its assessed credits

controls.control_objective: To ensure rest solely with the principal cardholder and not with the add-on cardholders
controls.control_description:
Explanation: The liability for dues shall rest solely with the principal cardholder and not
with the add-on cardholders.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to rest solely with the principal cardholder and not with the add-on cardholders

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be governed as per fema regulations
controls.control_description:
However, settlement of dues towards international credit card
shall also be governed as per FEMA regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be governed as per fema regulations

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by the terms and conditions agreed upon
controls.control_description:
Further, the responsibility for making
payments in case of business credit cards shall be governed by the terms and conditions
agreed upon.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed by the terms and conditions agreed upon

controls.control_objective: To ensure be honoured within seven working days by the credit card-issuer
controls.control_description:
Any request for closure of a credit card shall be honoured within seven working days by
the credit card-issuer, subject to payment of all dues by the cardholder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be honoured within seven working days by the credit card-issuer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be immediately notified about the closure through email, sms, etc
controls.control_description:
Subsequent to
the closure of credit card, the cardholder shall be immediately notified about the closure
through email, SMS, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be immediately notified about the closure through email, sms, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided option to submit request for closure of credit card account through multiple channels such as helpline, dedicated email-id, interactive vo
controls.control_description:
Cardholders shall be provided option to submit request for
closure of credit card account through multiple channels such as helpline, dedicated
email-id, Interactive Voice Response (IVR), prominently visible link on the website,
internet banking, mobile-app or any other mode.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be provided option to submit request for closure of credit card account through multiple channels such as helpline, dedicated email-id, interactive vo

controls.control_objective: To ensure insist on sending a closure request through post or any other means which may result in the delay of receipt of the request
controls.control_description:
The card-issuer shall not insist on
sending a closure request through post or any other means which may result in the delay
of receipt of the request.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to insist on sending a closure request through post or any other means which may result in the delay of receipt of the request

controls.control_objective: To ensure result in a penalty of ₹500 per calendar day of <image> delay payable to the cardholder, till the closure of the account provided there is no outstand
controls.control_description:
Failure on the part of the card-issuers to complete the process
of closure within seven working days shall result in a penalty of ₹500 per calendar day of
<image>
delay payable to the cardholder, till the closure of the account provided there is no
outstanding in the account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to result in a penalty of ₹500 per calendar day of <image> delay payable to the cardholder, till the closure of the account provided there is no outstand

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide details regarding such outstanding dues to the cardholder upon receipt of the closure request without waiting for completion of the billing cy
controls.control_description:
Explanation: In case payment towards dues is outstanding, the card-issuer shall provide
details regarding such outstanding dues to the cardholder upon receipt of the closure
request without waiting for completion of the billing cycle and accordingly advise him / her
to make payment in order to complete the closure process.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide details regarding such outstanding dues to the cardholder upon receipt of the closure request without waiting for completion of the billing cy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated after excluding the number of days taken by the cardholder to clear the outstanding dues
controls.control_description:
In such cases, the prescribed
timeline of seven working days shall be calculated after excluding the number of days
taken by the cardholder to clear the outstanding dues.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated after excluding the number of days taken by the cardholder to clear the outstanding dues

controls.control_objective: To ensure also report to cics suitably about the closure of the card account
controls.control_description:
The card-issuer shall also report to
CICs suitably about the closure of the card account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also report to cics suitably about the closure of the card account

controls.control_objective: To ensure be initiated after intimating the cardholder
controls.control_description:
If a credit card has not been used for a period of more than one year, the process to close
the card shall be initiated after intimating the cardholder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be initiated after intimating the cardholder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be closed by the card-issuer
controls.control_description:
If no reply is received from the
cardholder within a period of 30 days, the card account shall be closed by the card-issuer,
subject to payment of all dues by the cardholder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be closed by the card-issuer

controls.control_objective: To ensure also accordingly be updated with the credit information company/ies within a period of 30 days
controls.control_description:
The information regarding the closure of
card account shall also accordingly be updated with the Credit Information Company/ies
within a period of 30 days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also accordingly be updated with the credit information company/ies within a period of 30 days

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered for treating a card as 'used'
controls.control_description:
Explanation: In addition to financial transactions, any process initiated by the cardholder
such as generation of statement, change of PIN, change in transaction controls, etc., shall
be considered for treating a card as 'used'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered for treating a card as 'used'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered towards usage of a card
controls.control_description:
However, any calls made to the customer care
centre, for reasons other than those cited above, shall not be considered towards usage
of a card.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered towards usage of a card

controls.control_objective: To ensure be transferred to the cardholder's bank account
controls.control_description:
Subsequent to closure of credit card account, any credit balance available in credit card
accounts shall be transferred to the cardholder's bank account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be transferred to the cardholder's bank account

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain the details of the cardholder's bank account
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall obtain
the details of the cardholder's bank account, if the same is not available with them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain the details of the cardholder's bank account

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - interest rates on advances) directions, 2025 as amended from time to time, while determinin
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall be guided by the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Interest
Rates on Advances) Directions, 2025 as amended from time to time, while determining

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a grievance redressal mechanism within the card issuing entity and give wide publicity about it through electronic and print media
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall put in place a Grievance Redressal Mechanism within the card issuing
entity and give wide publicity about it through electronic and print media.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a grievance redressal mechanism within the card issuing entity and give wide publicity about it through electronic and print media

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mentioned on the credit card bills and account statements
controls.control_description:
The name, direct
contact number, email-id and postal address of the designated grievance redressal officer
of the card-issuer shall be mentioned on the credit card bills and account statements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mentioned on the credit card bills and account statements

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that grievances of cardholders are redressed promptly without any delay
controls.control_description:
The
designated officer shall ensure that grievances of cardholders are redressed promptly
without any delay.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that grievances of cardholders are redressed promptly without any delay

controls.control_objective: To ensure be stipulated in the board approved policy for issuance of cards, redressal of grievances and compensation framework
controls.control_description:
Specific timelines may be stipulated in the Board approved policy for
issuance of cards, redressal of grievances and compensation framework.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be stipulated in the board approved policy for issuance of cards, redressal of grievances and compensation framework

controls.control_objective: To ensure be displayed on the website of the card-issuer with a clearly visible link on the homepage
controls.control_description:
The grievance
redressal procedure and the Board approved policy shall be displayed on the website of
the card-issuer with a clearly visible link on the homepage.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be displayed on the website of the card-issuer with a clearly visible link on the homepage

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that their call centre staff are trained adequately to competently handle and escalate, a complaint
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall ensure that their call centre staff are trained adequately to competently
handle and escalate, a complaint, if necessary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that their call centre staff are trained adequately to competently handle and escalate, a complaint

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a provision for automatic escalation of unresolved complaints from a call center / base level to higher authorities
controls.control_description:
The Grievance Redressal process shall
have a provision for automatic escalation of unresolved complaints from a call center /
base level to higher authorities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a provision for automatic escalation of unresolved complaints from a call center / base level to higher authorities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a system of acknowledging customers' complaints for follow up, such as complaint number / docket number, even if the complaints are received over p
controls.control_description:
There shall be a system of acknowledging customers'
complaints for follow up, such as complaint number / docket number, even if the
complaints are received over phone.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a system of acknowledging customers' complaints for follow up, such as complaint number / docket number, even if the complaints are received over p

controls.control_objective: To ensure be liable to compensate the complainant for the loss of his / her time, expenses, financial loss as well as for the harassment and mental anguish suff
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall be liable to compensate the complainant for the loss of his / her time,
expenses, financial loss as well as for the harassment and mental anguish suffered by
him/her for the fault of the card-issuer and where the grievance has not been redressed
in time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be liable to compensate the complainant for the loss of his / her time, expenses, financial loss as well as for the harassment and mental anguish suff

controls.control_objective: To ensure first approach the concerned card-issuer
controls.control_description:
For redressal of his / her grievance, the customer must first approach the
concerned card-issuer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to first approach the concerned card-issuer

controls.control_objective: To ensure reveal any information relating to customers obtained at the time of opening the account or issuing the card to any other person or organization witho
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall not reveal any information relating to customers obtained at the time of
opening the account or issuing the card to any other person or organization without
obtaining their explicit consent, with regard to the purpose/s for which the information will
be used and the organizations with whom the information will be shared.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reveal any information relating to customers obtained at the time of opening the account or issuing the card to any other person or organization witho

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure strict compliance to the extant legal framework on data protection
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers
shall ensure strict compliance to the extant legal framework on data protection.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to ensure strict compliance to the extant legal framework on data protection

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly state and explain to the customer the full meaning / implications of the disclosure clause
controls.control_description:
Further,
in case where the customers give explicit consent for sharing the information provided by
them with other agencies, card-issuers shall clearly state and explain to the customer the
full meaning / implications of the disclosure clause.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clearly state and explain to the customer the full meaning / implications of the disclosure clause

controls.control_objective: To ensure be of such nature which will violate the provisions of law relating to maintenance of secrecy in the transactions
controls.control_description:
The information sought from
customers shall not be of such nature which will violate the provisions of law relating to
maintenance of secrecy in the transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be of such nature which will violate the provisions of law relating to maintenance of secrecy in the transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be solely responsible for the correctness or otherwise of the data provided for the purpose
controls.control_description:
The card-issuers shall be solely responsible
for the correctness or otherwise of the data provided for the purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be solely responsible for the correctness or otherwise of the data provided for the purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to access any details of customer's accounts that may violate the card-issuer's secrecy obligations
controls.control_description:
Under a co-branding arrangement, the co-branding entity shall not be permitted to access
any details of customer's accounts that may violate the card-issuer's secrecy obligations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to access any details of customer's accounts that may violate the card-issuer's secrecy obligations

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure compliance with the relevant instructions
controls.control_description:
In case, the co-branding arrangement is
between two banks, the card issuing bank shall ensure compliance with the relevant
instructions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure compliance with the relevant instructions

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure adherence to the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - managing risks in outsourcing) directions, 2025, as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall ensure adherence to the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks -
Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure adherence to the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - managing risks in outsourcing) directions, 2025, as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure share card data (including transaction data) of the cardholders with the outsourcing partners unless sharing of such data is essential to discharge th
controls.control_description:
Further,
the card-issuers shall not share card data (including transaction data) of the cardholders
with the outsourcing partners unless sharing of such data is essential to discharge the
functions assigned to the latter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to share card data (including transaction data) of the cardholders with the outsourcing partners unless sharing of such data is essential to discharge th

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained
controls.control_description:
In case of sharing of any data as stated above, explicit
consent from the cardholder shall be obtained.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be ensured that the storage and the ownership of card data remains with the card-issuer
controls.control_description:
It shall also be ensured that the storage
and the ownership of card data remains with the card-issuer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be ensured that the storage and the ownership of card data remains with the card-issuer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be strictly adhered to in respect of all cards issued, including co-branded cards
controls.control_description:
The instructions / Directions on KYC / AML / CFT issued by RBI from time to time, shall
be strictly adhered to in respect of all cards issued, including co-branded cards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be strictly adhered to in respect of all cards issued, including co-branded cards

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide to the cardholder the term-sheet containing the mitc
controls.control_description: Card-issuers shall provide to the cardholder the term-sheet containing the MITC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide to the cardholder the term-sheet containing the mitc

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain the following details: (1) fees and charges
controls.control_description:
The
document should contain the following details:
(1) Fees and Charges
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain the following details: (1) fees and charges

controls.control_objective: To ensure desire
controls.control_description:
Items to be disclosed in stages:
(1) During marketing - Item no: 91 (1)
(2) At application - Key fact statement containing items from 91 (1) to (3) and any additional
information that the customer may desire.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to desire

controls.control_objective: To ensure be minimum arial-12
controls.control_description: (i) The font size of MITC shall be minimum Arial-12
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be minimum arial-12

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue as hitherto
controls.control_description:
(ii) The normal terms and conditions communicated by the card-issuer to the cardholder
at different stages shall continue as hitherto.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue as hitherto

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions,
instructions and guidelines already repealed shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to be
governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted under
these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such
investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued, or enforced
and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions,
instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of the
provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to remove
any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these Directions, the
RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in respect of any matter
covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these Directions given by the RBI
shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
